Laboratory of Nanomedicine and Healthcare Biomaterials

Welcome to our lab at NJIT.

Who are we?

We explore the interface of biomaterials and medicine using chemistry, materials science and engineering.

Translational Biomaterials

From lipid nanoparticles (LNPs) to membrane-hybrid nanovaccines, engineered for delivery and safety.

RNA & Protein Therapeutics

mRNA, siRNA, and logic-gated constructs paired with rational delivery for targeted expression.

Scalable Manufacturing

Hollow-fiber–based continuous production with tunable mixing, size control, and high throughput.

Our Focus

We develop multifunctional biomaterials for medical applications and study structure–function relationships.

Therapeutic Delivery

LNPs and vesicles optimized for biodistribution, stability, and endosomal escape.

Hydrogels & Scaffolds

Injectable gels and bioactive matrices enabling regeneration and controlled release.

Structure–Function

Correlating composition, assembly, and microstructure with in vitro/in vivo performance.

Latest News

  • 2025-10-14RBC–LNP circulation study preprint released
  • 2025-09-22CFN SAXS beamtime: preliminary results
  • 2025-08-10HFM-LNP patent submitted
